reviewer: Producer: TB closed all reachable; uncovered are RTL constants
approver: Approver: independently verified each against idu.v RTL 2026-06-09; corrects an earlier charter which assumed funct3 default coverable (it is not: funct3 is fully 8/8 decoded).

waivers.structural_basis: idu.v:208/220 `default: alu_op=ALU_ADD` in the OP-IMM/OP funct3 case. funct3 is 3-bit and all 8 values are decoded (F3_ADD_SUB/SLT/SLTU/XOR/OR/AND/SLL/SRL_SRA, idu.v:198-208/210-220), so the default arm is unreachable (no 9th funct3 value). Defensive default.
waivers.stimulus_considered: all 8 funct3 values driven for OP and OP-IMM; no illegal funct3 exists for a fully-decoded 3-bit field

waivers.structural_basis: csr_zimm = {27'b0, instr[19:15]} (idu.v:122) — zero-extended CSR immediate; bits [31:5] are hardwired 0 and can never toggle.
waivers.stimulus_considered: all CSR-immediate values (zimm[4:0]) driven; upper bits are RTL constants

waivers.structural_basis: imm_u = {instr[31:12], 12'b0} (idu.v:91) — U-type immediate low 12 bits hardwired 0 (RISC-V LUI/AUIPC encoding).
waivers.stimulus_considered: varied LUI/AUIPC immediates; low 12 bits are RTL constants

waivers.structural_basis: imm_b/imm_j bit[0] = 1'b0 (idu.v:90,92) — B/J-type immediates are 2-byte aligned; bit 0 hardwired 0 per RISC-V encoding.
waivers.stimulus_considered: varied branch/jal targets; bit 0 is an RTL constant
